introSection: Herra Lohikäärme (English: Lord Dragon) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Vauhtipuisto in Oulu, North Ostrobothnia, Finland.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a dragon.

fullText:
Herra Lohikäärme (English: Lord Dragon) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Vauhtipuisto in Oulu, North Ostrobothnia, Finland.



Green track and pink supports.

The train is designed to resemble a dragon.
